docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, SEE ATTACHMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF A. JONATHAN SPEEED IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ESSEX MAANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT THROUGH BRENYONNIA REEVES (COMMUNITY MANAGER). THE CASE IS ABOUT LANDLORD/TENANT DISPUTE RE: DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO PROVIDE HABITABLE PLACE, PESTS INFESTATION (RODENTS, BUGS ETC). IS ALLEGED BY THE PLAINTIFF. ALSO, A PRIOR CASE CSM-869898 WAS ALREADY DECIDED IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM-GRANTED BY THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-29-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-12-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN
DECLARATION REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SPEED, A. JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRENYONNIA REEVES FILED BY DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $95.00 SERVED AUG-07-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
